title: The Curse of the Crumbly Cracker
cover_description: A dramatic witch looms over a tiny crumb on the floor, pointing dramatically as a toaster pops in the background, launching toast into the air.
script:
[TITLE: The Curse of the Crumbly Cracker]
[AGE: 6-8]
[VOICES: mysterious_witch]
[COMEDY_TYPE: ominous_mundane]

[SETUP]
[WITCH] [DELIVERY: ominous, tentative] Behold, child... a humble cracker lies upon the table. [STING: witch_ominous]
[WITCH] [DELIVERY: confident, building] But this is no ordinary snack... it is the first sign of the Great Crumbling. [STING: buildup_short]
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[WITCH] [DELIVERY: suspicious, pressing] See how its edges fray... like the walls of a doomed castle. [STING: witch_dramatic]
[WITCH] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] A single crumb falls... the first tremor of the coming collapse! [STING: tiny]
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[WITCH] [DELIVERY: panicked, loud] The cracker splits in two! The prophecy unfolds before our very eyes! [STING: medium_hit]
[WITCH] [DELIVERY: desperate] The table trembles... the plates rattle... the very foundations of snack time quake! [STING: buildup_long]
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[WITCH] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] The cracker shatters into dust... and the kitchen... the kitchen is swallowed by the void. [STING: big_crash]
[WITCH] [DELIVERY: stunned, ominous] ...Or perhaps that was just the toaster popping. [STING: deflation]
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[WITCH] [DELIVERY: triumphant, loud] [PUNCHLINE]Beware, child... for the next crumb may herald the end of all buttered toast![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: villain_dramatic]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: A dramatic witch looms over a tiny crumb on the floor, pointing dramatically as a toaster pops in the background, launching toast into the air.]
[PREMISE: Cracker crumbs foretell snack-time doom]
host_intro: Tonight, Shadow warns you about a cracker. It is just a cracker.
host_outro: The kitchen survived. Shadow is not convinced it will happen again.
